![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mcurematte-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

CURE MATTE REDEFINED

## Exterior / maintenance

### Ceramic spray sealant for matte paint..

Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED is a silica-based maintenance spray explicitly developed for matte-finished paint. It provides durable protection, self-cleaning properties, and colour depth enhancement without adding gloss, making it suitable for regular maintenance of matte surfaces.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/productmain_1700x1645px_q2m_cure-matte_500_2023-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Versatile hydrophobic ceramic maintenance spray and sealant.

Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED helps preserve the appearance and performance of matte finishes by refreshing hydrophobic behaviour and preventing contamination build up. Regular use can extend the durability of water repellency while keeping the original matte look intact.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons17.svg)

MATTE CERAMIC MAINTENANCE 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons69.svg)

SELF-CLEANING PROPERTIES 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/benefiticons32.svg)

WATER REPELLENT 

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640q2mcurematte.webp)

CAPACITIES 

500 ML

Durability 

Gloss 

Beading 

Self-cleaning 

Real World Lifespan

over 6 weeks

PH Tolerance

4-9

Consumption

30ml/car

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

CURE MATTE REDEFINED

01
Apply Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED to a clean surface or microfibre towel. 

02
Spread evenly over the matte surface. 

03
Wipe gently to remove excess product. 

04
Use regularly to maintain protection and appearance. 

05
Avoid over application to prevent marks. 

### Watch
product
video

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
Is Q²M Cure Matte REDEFINED safe for matte paint? 

Yes. It is designed specifically for matte finishes.

02
Does it add gloss to the surface? 

No. It maintains the original matte appearance.

03
Can it be used as a stand alone product? 

Yes. It protects its own.

04
How often should it be applied? 

Regular use during maintenance is recommended.

05
Does it help prevent water spots? 

Yes. It helps reduce water spotting on matte surfaces.

[FIND MORE ANSWERS](https://gyeon.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/sections/360000260877-Q-M-Cure-Matte)

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
